tagline: Asset-light swim school franchise generating recurring revenue through rented pool space with no build-out costs and 26% average net margins disclosed in Item 19.
description_short: British Swim School is a home-based, asset-light franchise where owners rent pool lanes from existing fitness centers, hotels, and schools rather than building a facility. With an average unit volume of $461K, 26% net margins, and a minimum investment under $170K, this is a scalable, low-overhead opportunity in the essential water safety education market.
market_intelligence_insight: The swim school franchise market was valued at $1.25 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $2.78 billion by 2033 at a 9.1% CAGR, driven by rising water safety awareness and the recognition of swimming as an essential life skill for children.
item_19_headline: Average gross revenue of $461K with 26% net margin across reporting units in calendar year 2024.
ongoing_support: field support representatives, online learning management system, technology platform, marketing support, annual conventions, franchisee network access
